postingSummary: Premium driveway-restoration company in Maryland needs a Phase 1 marketing website launched in ~1 week. Fixed-price Phase 1 ($850–$1,200, Rocket hosting included for first couple months), with a separate estimate for Phase 2 (ongoing multi-state partnership). Mobile-first, luxury aesthetic inspired by Apple/Restoration Hardware, deep charcoal/white/forest-green palette, big before/after photography, sticky 'Call Now' + 'Text a Photo' CTAs. Core deliverable is lead generation (phone calls + text estimate requests) plus local-SEO foundation.

budget.hosting_included: Rocket.net (preferred), or Kinsta/WP Engine. First couple months included.
budget.note: Phase 2 quoted separately as an ongoing engagement.

phase1_pages: Free Estimate (QR landing page, dedicated flow)

sections: Hero with before/after image and headline: 'Restore Your Driveway. Don't Replace It.'
Primary CTAs: Call Now / Text a Photo

phase1_pages_details.driveway_restoration: Service detail page explaining the restoration process, materials, timeline, benefits vs. replacement.
phase1_pages_details.pricing: Clear pricing table or breakdown for restoration options.
phase1_pages_details.gallery: Large before/after photography showcase (at least 12–20 images).
phase1_pages_details.about: Company mission, team, credentials, environmental commitment (tree-planting/community initiative mentioned).
phase1_pages_details.faq: Frequent questions about restoration, durability, maintenance, warranty.
phase1_pages_details.contact_estimate: Lead-capture form (name, email, phone, property address, photo upload option, service area selection).
phase1_pages_details.service_areas: Geographic coverage map and/or list of Maryland service areas (Annapolis area focus).
phase1_pages_details.free_estimate_qr_page: Dedicated landing page (separate from contact form). Includes one powerful before/after image, brief explanation, Call Now, Text a Photo, and simple estimate form. QR codes on signs/postcards/flyers point here, not homepage.

design_direction.aesthetic: Premium modern, inspired by Apple, Restoration Hardware, luxury home builders.
design_direction.typography: Clean typography, serif/sans pairing appropriate to luxury aesthetic. Do NOT use michaelwegter.com's palette or design system.
design_direction.imagery: Large before/after photography as hero and throughout. Generous whitespace, minimal clutter.
design_direction.performance: Fast-loading design, Core Web Vitals optimized.

mobile_first_requirements: Design for phones first (responsive, mobile-first CSS).
Sticky 'Call Now' button (fixed position, always visible).
Sticky 'Text a Photo' button (fixed position, always visible).
Large touch targets (minimum 48px for tappable elements).
Simple, scannable navigation (hamburger menu on mobile).
Core Web Vitals optimized (LCP, FID, CLS all green).
seo_requirements: Unique title and meta description for every page.
Logical H1–H3 structure (one H1 per page, hierarchical headings).
Local Business schema (structured data for business name, address, phone, hours, logo).
FAQ schema (structured data for FAQ section).
Service schema (structured data for services offered).
Review schema (structured data for customer reviews/testimonials).
XML sitemap (auto-generated, submitted to Google Search Console).
Optimized image names and ALT text (descriptive, keyword-inclusive where natural).
Internal linking (logical cross-linking between pages, especially from homepage to service/location pages).
Google Business Profile optimization (claim/verify profile, add photos, categories, hours).
Fast page speed (PageSpeed Insights green; Lighthouse performance 90+).
tech_stack: WordPress (or static equivalent in the demo)
Bricks Builder (noted as preferred; demo will use custom HTML/CSS)
Rank Math SEO (all schema/structured data built into static demo)
Fluent Forms (or static form with Flask backend for submissions)
ShortPixel (image optimization; demo will use lazy-loading and optimized assets)
Wordfence (security; not applicable to static demo, documented for Phase 2 WP deployment)
UpdraftPlus (backup; not applicable to static demo, documented for Phase 2 WP deployment)
Google Site Kit (GA4, GSC integration; demo will include GA4 event hooks)
integrations: Google Analytics 4 (event tracking for CTA clicks, form submissions).
Google Search Console (sitemap submission, indexing status).

developer_questions_to_answer.question: Can you launch within one week?
Can you stay within the Phase 1 budget?
developer_questions_to_answer.answer_required: Yes, fixed price $850–$1,200 with Rocket hosting included for first couple months

developer_questions_to_answer.question: Will the site be easy for the owner to edit?
developer_questions_to_answer.answer_required: Yes, WordPress (or equivalent) dashboard with intuitive content management

developer_questions_to_answer.question: How do you optimize Core Web Vitals?
developer_questions_to_answer.answer_required: Lazy loading, optimized images, minimal CSS/JS, server-side caching, CDN

developer_questions_to_answer.question: Will you configure Analytics, Search Console and schema?
developer_questions_to_answer.answer_required: Yes, GA4 and GSC set up, all required schema embedded (LocalBusiness, FAQ, Service, Review)

developer_questions_to_answer.question: Can Phase 2 be added without rebuilding?
developer_questions_to_answer.answer_required: Yes, Phase 2 layers onto Phase 1 (city landing pages, learning center, etc.)

proposal_requirements: Fixed-price quote for Phase 1 ($850–$1,200 with Rocket hosting included for first couple months).
Separate, itemized estimate for Phase 2 (30–50 city/neighborhood landing pages, learning center, video library, interactive estimate calculator, case studies, expanded gallery, advanced local SEO).
Portfolio (reference to Michael's existing work, especially fortherecordmn.com for SEO + Google Analytics).
References (client testimonials or case studies from similar projects).
Post-launch support (first 30 days of updates/fixes, ongoing SEO/analytics monitoring roadmap).

content: Brief explanation of restoration vs. replacement
qr_code_strategy.usage: QR codes on signs, postcards, flyers should point to /free-estimate, not homepage.

phase2_scope: 30–50 city/neighborhood landing pages (Maryland cities: Annapolis, Baltimore, Columbia, Frederick, Towson, etc.)
Learning Center (blog/resource section on restoration tips, maintenance, longevity).
Video library (before/after time-lapses, testimonial videos, process explanation).
Interactive estimate calculator (users input property details, get instant rough estimate).
Case studies (detailed project write-ups with photos, outcomes, client testimonials).
Expanded gallery (60+ high-quality before/after images, organized by project type).
Advanced local SEO (schema optimization per location, geo-targeted keywords, local link building).

mission_and_brand.positioning: Premium driveway restoration company—NOT a traditional sealcoating contractor.
mission_and_brand.mission: Help homeowners restore rather than replace whenever practical, improve curb appeal, extend driveway life, and support environmentally conscious practices.
mission_and_brand.future_initiative: As the business grows, intends to include tree-planting/community initiative.

demo_hosting.registry_entry: workSamples.js with client, postingSummary, builtFor, date (ISO), proposalDeckUrl, proposalPageUrl

feature_richness_note: 10/10 = all 8 Phase-1 pages + dedicated /free-estimate QR page + real before/after slider component + multi-step estimate form with photo upload + embedded LocalBusiness/Service/FAQ/Review schema + GA4 event hooks + service-area map + Lighthouse 90+ performance.

proof_of_capability.work_cited: SEO work and Google Analytics implementation (researcher to verify and gather concrete details for proposal)

success_criteria: Professional, mobile-first experience (responsive, sticky CTAs, large touch targets).
Fast loading (Core Web Vitals green, Lighthouse 90+).
SEO-ready (all required schema embedded, unique title/meta per page, logical H1–H3, optimized images).
Easy to maintain (content updates via dashboard or CMS, no dev needed for routine edits).
Strong lead generation (form submissions tracked in GA4, phone/text CTAs working).
Live demo at michaelwegter.com/demos/maryland-driveway-restore/ with working estimate form.
Proposal includes cover letter, one-pager, and presentation deck citing fortherecordmn.com proof.
hard_gates: Every explicit requirement in brief.json addressed in cover letter AND represented in demo or deck.
Demo builds and loads with no console errors on first paint.
Demo URL resolves locally and live /work-samples/maryland-driveway-restore returns 200.
Demo link appears in both cover letter and deck.
Bespoke, client-fit design (NOT michaelwegter.com palette). No em/en dashes.
eval-report.md shows passing score and empty/accepted fix list.
